---
title: "‘Princess Mary Adelaide.’ By C.M. Yonge"
---

## ‘Princess Mary Adelaide.’ By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1900
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (April 1900), 143-4.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
